// All unique ingredients across all recipes, sorted alphabetically.
// Used to populate the ingredient selector panel.

const ingredients = [
  "agar-agar",
  "all-purpose flour",
  "baking powder",
  "baking soda",
  "banana",
  "brown sugar",
  "butter",
  "chocolate chips",
  "cinnamon",
  "cocoa powder",
  "coconut oil",
  "condensed milk",
  "cream cheese",
  "crushed pistachios",
  "dark chocolate",
  "digestive biscuits",
  "egg",
  "fresh strawberries",
  "gelatin",
  "heavy cream",
  "instant yeast",
  "kataifi dough",
  "mango",
  "mango juice",
  "marie biscuits",
  "milk",
  "powdered sugar",
  "ripe bananas",
  "salt",
  "strawberry jam",
  "sugar",
  "vanilla extract",
  "vegetable oil",
  "warm milk",
  "whipped cream",
  "white chocolate",
];

export default ingredients;
